headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on Starbucks, Raises Price Target to $117
summary: Stifel  analyst Chris O'Cull   maintains Starbucks (NASDAQ:SBUX) with a Buy and raises the price target from $115 to $117.

headline: Positioning for a Big Move: SBUX Long Straddle Trade Idea
summary: When volatility is low, options become cheaper, so today we’re looking for stocks with a low IV Percentile which could be good candidates for a Long Straddle trade.

headline: Wall Street Breakfast Podcast: Soda & Chips: McDonald's And AMD In Focus
summary: McDonald's adds barista-style role to stores as part of refreshers & crafted soda launch. AMD shoots up as Q1 results, guidance top estimates. Apple to pay $250M to settle with shareholders.
